author: PC Gamer
text:
'The curse of MIXED is broken:' Suda51 & Swery65's Hotel Barcelona claws its way to 'Mostly Positive' on Steam after Hail Mary patch and scrubbing AI assets
Redemption arc?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Everything we know about Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, the Remake trilogy's last act
Can I defeat Emerald and Ruby Weapon as an adult? We'll know soon.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Destiny 2 goes out as God intended: Amidst absurd streamer drama featuring four content creators, an esports org, a boutique PC maker, an ex-NFL star, and $180,000
Strap in, kids.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Destiny 2's final update crushes the Steam concurrents peak hit by last year's Edge of Fate expansion
Destiny 2 is full of life, even as the Monument of Triumph patch marks the end of live service updates.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Path of Exile 2 player willingly deletes level 100 character to become world first martyr, buffing everyone in the game: 'That was the coolest thing I've seen in a videogame in a very long time'
Thanks for your sacrifice.

author: PC Gamer
text:
One day before launch, extraction shooter Sand gets delayed again—oh, and it's an early access game now, too
It'll be a few more weeks (at least) before you can ride your mechanical base into the desert.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Nobody can tell if Overwatch's 52nd hero is supposed to be a robot or a human, but we won't have to wait long to find out
Shion will debut in season 3 next week.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Elder Scrolls Online is now Steam Deck Verified after 2 years of tweaking
This seems like a dangerous combo.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Secretlab's new Atlas chair is cheaper, slimmer than the Titan Evo and I've been sitting comfortably in it for the past couple days
Starts at $499.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I was roasted by a physician for sitting weird but they gave me some great tips for healthier gaming
It only took talking to an esports medicine expert to make me realise where I was going wrong.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Secretlab's CEO is getting tough on copycat chairs and doesn't feel pressure to adopt AI: 'If we were owned by outside investors, you can bet that AI will be somehow jammed down our throats'
I speak with Ian Ang about building a gaming chair company at the company's Singapore office.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Surely FromSoftware has something brewing besides that Switch 2 exclusive, right?
A crumb of FromSoft, I'm begging you.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Best Amazon Prime Day keyboard, mouse and controller deals - get your hands on these discounted peripherals
I'm all over the best Prime Day deals on peripherals this year.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'The thing that gives me hope is there is an enormous amount of capacity being built' - AMD's head of Ryzen and Radeon is pinning hopes of an end to the memory crisis on a supply ramp into 2028
And some companies even reckon prices will get worse before they get better.

author: PC Gamer
text:
2026 is shaping up to be one of the worst years ever for new graphics cards as Nvidia's RTX 50 Super Series refresh rumoured to be pushed out to 2027
The slim GPU pickings look set to continue.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Kingdom Hearts 4 shows first signs of life after 4 years of radio silence
We are so back, keyblade warriors.

author: PC Gamer
text:
KTC M27T6S review
An affordable 1440p mini-LED gaming monitor with truly eye-popping performance.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Koorui 34E6UC review
A budget 34-inch ultrawide gaming monitor that's big on immersion but ever so slightly sluggish.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Tech leaker claims that the RTX 50 Super refresh is still on, despite the RAMpocalypse, and it'll be joined by a 12 GB RTX 5060
Gotta use all them Blackwell dies somehow.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Halo Campaign Evolved: Everything we know about Master Chief's glow-up
Combat Evolved is back (again).

author: PC Gamer
text:
We got our eyes and noses on a new PC case with a magnetic essential oils diffuser to make your gaming den smell less like a gaming den
Though it has surprisingly little wood for a PC case called 'Ten Wood'.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Gabe Newell's racecar driver son Gray Newell to compete in 24 Hours of Le Mans endurance race
Formula Son.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Stars Reach could be the second coming of the sandbox MMO, with player-built cities and 40+ Star Wars Galaxies-style professions to give me hope
"Players have practically invented Steam Power."

author: PC Gamer
text:
New rumour claims with '100%' confidence that AMD's next-gen Zen 6 desktop CPU will run at over 6.5 GHz
However fast it is, AMD says Zen 6 is coming later this year.

author: PC Gamer
text:
We all know Arc Raiders' loot chase is broken—but this creator proved how bad the duping exploits and cheating really are
Perhaps forced wipes don't seem so bad now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
After 3,000 hours spent in Total War: Warhammer, 40k's gameplay reveal has me convinced this one might genuinely end me
Damn good way to go, though.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel adds 7 more games to its IBOT-boosted list, though few of them stand out as being in dire need of more CPU horsepower
If you have a 270K Plus and an RTX 5090, you could see up to 27% more performance in Silksong…at 1080p High, that is.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Google reportedly orders at least three million chips from Intel to arrive in 2028, as TSMC struggles to keep up with the AI boom
Could Intel's Foundry efforts be starting to pay off?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Apple's virtual Siri-ball is a glowing reminder to Google and Microsoft that user interfaces really matter in software
I'll take environmental lighting over a cell-blocking button any day of the week.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Destiny 2's final update – live coverage of the end of an era
News, reactions, and maybe a stifled tear or two as the highly-influential FPS gets its last content update.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The Mortal Shell 2 open beta was downloaded 250,000 times over the weekend
The action RPG's developer says the response has been "incredible," and it has begun fixing bugs and "tightening the experience."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Legendary JRPG studio's 23-year shun of the PC has ended: the next Vanillaware game will come to Steam
Vanillaware is getting with the times.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Donald Duck has five fingers in official art for Kingdom Hearts Collection, and that is definitely not right
Yup, it looks like we've got another one.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'The curse of MIXED is broken:' Suda51 & Swery65's Hotel Barcelona claws its way to 'Mostly Positive' on Steam after Hail Mary patch and scrubbing AI assets
